ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec.12200 Et Seq. Two Weeks Before The Hearing Date.
Off Calendar Jan-27-2026 Continued To Mar-24-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lorna Wong appeared in person (pro per) (petitioner).

The Court continued this matter for a Tagalog interpreter for Ms. Wong. Ms. Wong sated that she doesn't understand English that well. The matter is continued to March 24, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge:Cindee Mayfield. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Musto. Not reported.
